prompt: Order these landmarks by completion year (earliest to latest)

events.title: Great Pyramid of Giza
events.fact: 2560 BC — built as tomb for Pharaoh Khufu

events.title: Parthenon in Athens
events.fact: 447 BC — temple dedicated to goddess Athena

events.title: Terracotta Army buried
events.fact: 210 BC — buried with Qin Shi Huang in China

events.title: Colosseum completed
events.fact: 80 AD — Roman amphitheater completed under Titus

events.title: Machu Picchu built
events.fact: 1450 AD — Inca citadel in Peruvian Andes

events.title: Taj Mahal completed
events.fact: 1648 AD — white marble mausoleum in Agra, India

events.title: Eiffel Tower completed
events.fact: 1889 AD — entrance arch for World's Fair in Paris
